tool_description: This API delivers real-time data and features from Yahoo Finance, i.e. pretty much all publicly available content found on the website. You get a wide range of financial info, including summaries, real-time stock data, quotes, movers, exchange rates, historical market data and more, just like on finance.yahoo.com.

api_list.name: get_stock_recommendations
